label: Products
title: Products
description: Canonical registry for the Neuroartan product system, including ICOS category framing, capability architecture, user workflows, integrations, and software-facing implementation surfaces.

hero.title: Products
hero.description: Neuroartan Products defines ICOS as a new category: a voice-trained reflective cognition system that organizes continuity, pattern intelligence, profile memory, and long-term self-authored development into one governed product architecture.

sections.label: Overview
sections.title: Overview
sections.description: ICOS is positioned as a new product category: a user-trained reflective cognition system where voice, memory continuity, emotional patterning, and profile intelligence are organized into one long-term architecture.

sections.label: Capabilities
sections.title: Capabilities
sections.description: Core capabilities include voice training, reflective dialogue, thought-pattern analysis, emotion-aware interpretation, graph-linked continuity, profile memory, and longitudinal cognitive structuring across the user’s evolving record.

sections.label: Workflows
sections.title: Workflows
sections.description: Product workflows define how users capture, decode, label, link, reflect on, and govern their own material so the system can support continuity, insight retrieval, self-review, and structured long-term development.

sections.label: Integrations
sections.title: Integrations
sections.description: Integration architecture is reserved for identity sources, external knowledge inputs, continuity-linked services, and future governed system connections that extend ICOS without fragmenting profile ownership.

sections.label: Software
sections.title: Software
sections.description: Software surfaces translate the product architecture into release-facing systems, interface layers, profile infrastructure, and implementation pathways that operationalize ICOS as a governed software institution.
